requirement_topic.en: Radio Performance & CE Marking — RED Art. 3.2 (EN 300 328 / EN 301 893) — Netherlands / RDI
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电性能与CE标志 — RED第3.2条（EN 300 328 / EN 301 893）— 荷兰 / RDI
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電性能與CE標誌 — RED第3.2條（EN 300 328 / EN 301 893）— 荷蘭 / RDI

summary.en: Radio equipment placed on the Netherlands (EU) market must bear the CE marking and comply with Radio Equipment Directive 2014/53/EU Art. 3.2, requiring effective and efficient use of the radio spectrum. For Wi-Fi devices operating in the 2.4 GHz band (IEEE 802.11b/g/n/ax) and Bluetooth (Classic and BLE), the harmonised standard is EN 300 328 v2.2.2. For 5 GHz Wi-Fi (IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax), the applicable harmonised standard is EN 301 893 v2.1.1, including mandatory Dynamic Frequency Selection (DFS) for channels 52–140 on access points. Compliance grants presumption of conformity with RED Art. 3.2. Netherlands is an EU member state: RDI (Rijksinspectie Digitale Infrastructuur, formerly Agentschap Telecom) is the National Regulatory Authority (NRA) responsible for RED enforcement, spectrum monitoring, and customs inspection programs. RDI operates documented inspection programs at Rotterdam (Europe's largest port and the primary Asia-to-EU electronics gateway) targeting Chinese-origin wireless devices; products failing CE marking checks are detained, recalled, or destroyed at port. NVWA (Netherlands Food and Consumer Product Safety Authority) also conducts market surveillance for general product safety. CE marking must be affixed (minimum 5 mm height) before Netherlands or any EU market placement. An EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) must be held for 10 years.
summary.zh: 投放荷兰（欧盟）市场的无线电设备须加贴CE标志，并符合无线设备指令2014/53/EU第3.2条要求，即有效且高效地利用无线电频谱。适用于2.4 GHz频段Wi-Fi设备（IEEE 802.11b/g/n/ax）及蓝牙（经典蓝牙和BLE）的协调标准为EN 300 328 v2.2.2。适用于5 GHz Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax）的协调标准为EN 301 893 v2.1.1，接入点须强制实施动态频率选择（DFS，52–140信道）。符合上述标准可推定符合RED第3.2条。荷兰为欧盟成员国：RDI（荷兰数字基础设施检查局，前身为Agentschap Telecom）是负责RED执法、频谱监测及海关检查项目的国家监管机构。RDI在鹿特丹（欧洲最大港口及亚洲至欧盟电子产品的主要入境通道）开展有据可查的检查项目，专门针对中国产无线设备；CE标志检查未通过的产品将在港口被扣押、召回或销毁。NVWA（荷兰食品和消费品安全局）亦对一般产品安全开展市场监管。CE标志须在投放荷兰或任何欧盟市场前加贴（最低高度5 mm），欧盟合格声明（DoC）须保存10年。
summary.zht: 投放荷蘭（歐盟）市場的無線電設備須加貼CE標誌，並符合無線設備指令2014/53/EU第3.2條要求，即有效且高效地利用無線電頻譜。適用於2.4 GHz頻段Wi-Fi設備（IEEE 802.11b/g/n/ax）及藍牙（經典藍牙和BLE）的協調標準為EN 300 328 v2.2.2。適用於5 GHz Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11a/n/ac/ax）的協調標準為EN 301 893 v2.1.1，接入點須強制實施動態頻率選擇（DFS，52–140信道）。符合上述標準可推定符合RED第3.2條。荷蘭為歐盟成員國：RDI（荷蘭數字基礎設施檢查局，前身為Agentschap Telecom）是負責RED執法、頻譜監測及海關檢查項目的國家監管機構。RDI在鹿特丹（歐洲最大港口及亞洲至歐盟電子產品的主要入境通道）開展有據可查的檢查項目，專門針對中國產無線設備；CE標誌檢查未通過的產品將在港口被扣押、召回或銷毀。NVWA（荷蘭食品和消費品安全局）亦對一般產品安全開展市場監管。CE標誌須在投放荷蘭或任何歐盟市場前加貼（最低高度5 mm），歐盟合格聲明（DoC）須保存10年。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/53/EU (Radio Equipment Directive), Art. 3.2 — effective use of radio spectrum
EN 300 328 v2.2.2 — Wideband transmission systems; data transmission equipment operating in the 2.4 GHz ISM band (2.4 GHz Wi-Fi and Bluetooth)
EN 301 893 v2.1.1 — 5 GHz RLAN; requirements for harmonised use of 5 GHz spectrum (including mandatory DFS for channels 52–140)
Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 — market surveillance and CE marking framework
Decision 768/2008/EC — modular CE conformity assessment procedures

summary.en: In China, wireless transmitters (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth) must obtain SRRC Type Approval from the National Radio Administration (NRA/MIIT) under the MIIT/SRRC framework. The primary domestic technical standard for 2.4 GHz spread-spectrum devices is YD/T 1127 (series), and for Wi-Fi equipment GB 15629.11 (equivalent to IEEE 802.11). RF power limits and 5 GHz channel plans differ between China and the EU: China restricts 5 GHz outdoor use more tightly and does not align to the same DFS requirements as EN 301 893. SRRC type approval is a mandatory pre-market licence by administrative decision, not a self-declaration. It does not satisfy the EU RED Art. 3.2 or CE marking conformity assessment pathway. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) and FCC are similarly not recognised by RDI for Netherlands/EU market access.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线发射设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙）须依据工业和信息化部/国家无线电管理局（NRA/MIIT）框架取得SRRC型号核准。2.4 GHz扩频设备的主要国内技术标准为YD/T 1127系列，Wi-Fi设备适用GB 15629.11（等同IEEE 802.11）。中国与欧盟在射频功率限值及5 GHz信道规划方面存在差异：中国对5 GHz户外使用的限制比欧盟更为严格，且未与EN 301 893的DFS要求保持一致。SRRC型号核准为行政决定下的强制性上市前许可，而非自我声明，不满足欧盟RED第3.2条或CE标志合格评定路径要求。CCC（中国强制认证）和FCC同样不被RDI认可用于荷兰/欧盟市场准入。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線發射設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙）須依據工業和信息化部/國家無線電管理局（NRA/MIIT）框架取得SRRC型號核准。2.4 GHz擴頻設備的主要國內技術標準為YD/T 1127系列，Wi-Fi設備適用GB 15629.11（等同IEEE 802.11）。中國與歐盟在射頻功率限值及5 GHz信道規劃方面存在差異：中國對5 GHz戶外使用的限制比歐盟更為嚴格，且未與EN 301 893的DFS要求保持一致。SRRC型號核准為行政決定下的強制性上市前許可，而非自我聲明，不滿足歐盟RED第3.2條或CE標誌合格評定路徑要求。CCC（中國強制認證）和FCC同樣不被RDI認可用於荷蘭/歐盟市場准入。

standards_or_laws: MIIT/NRA SRRC Type Approval — mandatory pre-market radio licence for wireless transmitters in China
GB 15629.11 — Information technology; LAN specific requirements; Part 11: Wireless LAN MAC and physical layer specifications (equivalent to IEEE 802.11)
YD/T 1127 series — Mobile communication terminal radio frequency test methods (MIIT)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC type approval and CCC do not satisfy EU RED Art. 3.2 or the CE marking requirement for Netherlands. Manufacturers must obtain fresh EN 300 328 v2.2.2 (2.4 GHz) and/or EN 301 893 v2.1.1 (5 GHz) test reports from an EU-accredited or ILAC MRA-member test laboratory. Key technical gaps: (1) EIRP limits — EN 300 328 caps at 100 mW (20 dBm) EIRP for 2.4 GHz; (2) 5 GHz DFS — EN 301 893 mandates DFS for channels 52–140 on RLAN access points (not aligned to Chinese channel plan); (3) channel mask and occupied bandwidth per ETSI measurement methods. Rotterdam-specific risk: RDI actively samples Chinese-origin wireless devices at Rotterdam port under its inspection program; products without valid CE marking or with incorrect DoC are detained. Dutch language technical documentation is not required by RED, but Dutch labelling is required for consumer products under Dutch consumer law. Self-declaration (internal production control, Module A) is available if harmonised EN standards are fully applied; a Notified Body is required if the manufacturer deviates from harmonised standards.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC型号核准和CCC不满足荷兰EU RED第3.2条或CE标志要求。制造商须从欧盟认可或ILAC MRA成员检测实验室取得最新的EN 300 328 v2.2.2（2.4 GHz）和/或EN 301 893 v2.1.1（5 GHz）检测报告。主要技术差距：（1）EIRP限值——EN 300 328对2.4 GHz的EIRP限值为100 mW（20 dBm）；（2）5 GHz DFS——EN 301 893对RLAN接入点的52–140信道强制要求DFS（与中国信道规划不一致）；（3）依据ETSI测量方法的信道掩码及占用带宽。鹿特丹特定风险：RDI在鹿特丹港依据其检查项目主动抽样中国产无线设备；没有有效CE标志或合格声明不正确的产品将被扣押。RED不要求荷兰语技术文档，但荷兰消费品法律要求荷兰语标签。若完全采用协调EN标准，可进行自我声明（内部生产控制，模块A）；若制造商偏离协调标准，则须聘请公告机构。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC型號核准和CCC不滿足荷蘭EU RED第3.2條或CE標誌要求。製造商須從歐盟認可或ILAC MRA成員檢測實驗室取得最新的EN 300 328 v2.2.2（2.4 GHz）和/或EN 301 893 v2.1.1（5 GHz）檢測報告。主要技術差距：（1）EIRP限值——EN 300 328對2.4 GHz的EIRP限值為100 mW（20 dBm）；（2）5 GHz DFS——EN 301 893對RLAN接入點的52–140信道強制要求DFS（與中國信道規劃不一致）；（3）依據ETSI測量方法的信道掩碼及佔用頻寬。鹿特丹特定風險：RDI在鹿特丹港依據其檢查項目主動抽樣中國產無線設備；沒有有效CE標誌或合格聲明不正確的產品將被扣押。RED不要求荷蘭語技術文檔，但荷蘭消費品法律要求荷蘭語標籤。若完全採用協調EN標準，可進行自我聲明（內部生產控制，模塊A）；若製造商偏離協調標準，則須聘請公告機構。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU Art. 3.2; CE marking required before Netherlands or any EU market placement; RDI enforces via Rotterdam port inspections and market surveillance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC Type Approval (NRA/MIIT) required before sale or import in China; does not satisfy EU RED pathway

source.publisher: RDI (Rijksinspectie Digitale Infrastructuur) — Netherlands National Regulatory Authority for RED

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] RED Art. 3.2 radio performance CE marking is the primary mandatory gate for Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices entering the Netherlands. EN 300 328 (2.4 GHz) and EN 301 893 (5 GHz) are the harmonised standards. Chinese SRRC approval and CCC do not substitute. 5 GHz access points must demonstrate DFS compliance under EN 301 893. RDI actively inspects Chinese-origin electronics at Rotterdam — non-compliant products are detained at Europe's largest port. Test reports must be from an EU-recognised laboratory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] RED第3.2条无线电性能CE标志是Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备进入荷兰的首要强制门槛。EN 300 328（2.4 GHz）和EN 301 893（5 GHz）为适用协调标准。中国SRRC核准和CCC不可替代。5 GHz接入点须根据EN 301 893证明DFS合规性。RDI在鹿特丹主动检查中国产电子产品——不合规产品将在欧洲最大港口被扣押。检测报告须由欧盟认可实验室出具。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] RED第3.2條無線電性能CE標誌是Wi-Fi和藍牙設備進入荷蘭的首要強制門檻。EN 300 328（2.4 GHz）和EN 301 893（5 GHz）為適用協調標準。中國SRRC核准和CCC不可取代。5 GHz接入點須根據EN 301 893證明DFS合規性。RDI在鹿特丹主動檢查中國產電子產品——不合規產品將在歐洲最大港口被扣押。檢測報告須由歐盟認可實驗室出具。
